'''Alliance Underground Engineering''' was a conglomeration of [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]]s who worked for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. They were known to have designed the [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]], headed by [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] and [[Walex Blissex/Legends|Walex Blissex]].

{{Reb-stub}}
